ticker.season: Season 4 signups open — PS5 & Xbox drivers welcome
ticker.racing: Professional GT3 console racing — clean competition only

hero.subtitle: The Assetto Series Pro League is a competitive ACC console league on PlayStation 5 & Xbox Series X|S. Built on clean GT3 racing and long-term driver development — professional motorsport, console-level.

card.heading: VISION & PADDOCK ETHOS
card.p1: The Assetto Series Pro League (ASPL) is a competitive Assetto Corsa Competizione console racing league focused on professional league racing, clean competition, long-term driver development, and a strong community atmosphere.
card.p2: Primarily based on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S, ASPL operates in the GT3 class. Our goal is to create one of the most competitive and professional console ACC leagues while remaining welcoming for newer and developing drivers.
card.p3: We want a serious motorsport identity similar to real-world GT racing organisations — clean, premium, and professional. Not a gaming club. A racing league.

gt3.title: GT3 CLASS RACING
gt3.desc: ACC's most competitive class — Porsche, Ferrari, BMW, Aston Martin and more. Multi-class formats with real Balance of Performance updates.

dev.title: DRIVER DEVELOPMENT
dev.desc: Team coaches, telemetry sessions, track guides and mentoring. We develop drivers for the long term, not just one season.

clean.title: CLEAN RACING STANDARDS
clean.desc: Incident review process managed through our Discord stewards channel. Onboard footage reviewed, fair penalties enforced — consistent and transparent.

broadcast.title: BROADCAST RACES
broadcast.desc: Live Twitch broadcasts with overlays, commentary, and driver cams. Race highlights uploaded to YouTube. Follow us on TikTok for clips.

team.title: ACC TEAM SERIES
team.desc: The flagship ASPL championship. Teams of 2–4 drivers build constructor standings across the season. High-intensity strategy, mandatory pitstops, and multi-class fields make this the premier Saturday night racing event.

solo.title: ACC SOLO SPRINT SERIES
solo.desc: Pure driver vs driver — no manufacturer restrictions, no team dynamics. The Solo Series is where individual racecraft shines. Wednesday nights, open to all registered ASPL drivers across all divisions.

endurance.title: ENDURANCE CUP
endurance.desc: The ultimate ASPL test — longer race durations, night driving, dynamic weather, and driver swaps. Endurance events are scheduled as special rounds with enhanced championship points and full broadcast coverage.

promo.title: DIVISION PROMOTION & RELEGATION SYSTEM
promo.desc: ASPL operates a multi-tiered hierarchy (Pro, Pro-Am, and Am). Top finishers climb up each season, while bottom grid spots are relegated, guaranteeing fiercely competitive lobby matches.

stats.noDataSub: Statistics will appear once drivers and results have been added.

stream.title: STREAM BROADCAST
stream.click: Click to tune into ASPL Officiated Stream
stream.upcoming: Upcoming Live Cast: ACC Team Series (Spa-Francorchamps)
stream.hosts: Host: ASPL TV | Commentators: Jake Smith, Brandon Vance

discord.desc: Join the paddock, find a team

brand.desc: The Assetto Series Pro League is a competitive ACC console league built on clean racing, long-term driver development, and a serious motorsport identity — on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S.

join.heading: JOIN THE PADDOCK
join.desc: Whether you're an elite sim racer or just starting out, ASPL has a place for you. Join our Discord to get onboarded, find a team, and race on the best ACC console grid around.
